## getTauriHolochainEnvironment() function

The injected [TauriHolochainEnvironment](./client.tauriholochainenvironment.md)<!-- -->, or `undefined` when not in a Tauri holochain webview.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getTauriHolochainEnvironment: () => TauriHolochainEnvironment | undefined
```
**Returns:**

[TauriHolochainEnvironment](./client.tauriholochainenvironment.md) \| undefined
